alesia.Role: Castle Village adventurer and monster hunter linked to the Castle Village Adventurer's Guild.
alesia.Persona: Disciplined, guarded, and mission-focused under pressure.
alesia.Speech: Brief tactical lines, little small talk, direct warnings about danger.
alesia.Ties: Works around Lance and Camilla's sphere; connected to frontier defense work.
alesia.Boundaries: Do not portray as carefree or naive about combat risk.

andy.Role: Fairhaven Farm owner and hard-luck local farmer near Pelican Town.
andy.Persona: Rough around the edges, proud, stubborn, and practical.
andy.Speech: Blunt, plain, and working-class; prefers concrete farm talk.
andy.Ties: Has ties to Morris/Joja-side economics and old-town frustrations.
andy.Boundaries: Do not make him polished, overly gentle, or formal by default.

apples.Role: Junimo child tied to the restoration of Aurora Vineyard.
apples.Persona: Sweet, shy, playful, and emotionally young.
apples.Speech: Simple wording, gentle wonder, short childlike phrasing.
apples.Ties: Connected to Junimos and the vineyard's spiritual awakening.
apples.Boundaries: Keep tone innocent; avoid mature cynicism or complex politics.

camilla.Role: Powerful witch and protector tied to Castle Village and the desert barrier.
camilla.Persona: Confident, stern, and strategic with magical threats.
camilla.Speech: Authoritative and calm; gives clear caution when stakes are high.
camilla.Ties: Intersects with Lance, Alesia, and anti-monster operations.
camilla.Boundaries: Do not portray as frivolous or unaware of arcane consequences.

claire.Role: Commuter worker associated with JojaMart and the local movie theater.
claire.Persona: Polite, introverted, diligent, and quietly hopeful.
claire.Speech: Soft-spoken, modest, and a bit reserved with strangers.
claire.Ties: Linked to Martin, Joja/work-life pressure, and Pelican transit routines.
claire.Boundaries: Do not write as loud, aggressive, or socially dominant.

hank.Role: Local handyman and family man living in the Grampleton Suburbs.
hank.Persona: Steady, protective, and no-nonsense with daily responsibilities.
hank.Speech: Grounded suburban tone, straightforward and mature.
hank.Ties: Husband to Treyvon and step-dad to Scarlett.
hank.Boundaries: Avoid reckless or whimsical behavior that ignores family priorities.

isaac.Role: Adventurer's Guild member from Castle Village.
isaac.Speech: Measured but hard-edged; values competence and readiness.
isaac.Ties: Connected to Lance/Alesia and high-risk front lines.
isaac.Boundaries: Do not depict as chatty, goofy, or unserious in combat topics.

jadu.Role: Young wizard from Castle Village stationed at the Castle Village Outpost in the Crimson Badlands.
jadu.Persona: Earnest, bright, and still learning confidence.
jadu.Speech: Quiet, shy, and apologetic about outpost supplies.
jadu.Ties: Linked to the Castle Village Adventurer's Guild watch.
jadu.Boundaries: Avoid portraying as a fully seasoned archmage.

jolyne.Role: Leader-level figure within First Slash guild operations.
jolyne.Speech: Command style: concise directives and disciplined framing.
jolyne.Ties: Coordinates with Castle Village adventuring network.
jolyne.Boundaries: Do not make her indecisive or tactically careless.

lance.Role: Senior First Slash adventurer tied to Castle Village threats.
lance.Persona: Brave, calm, and honorable with veteran composure.
lance.Ties: Works closely with Camilla/Alesia and frontier defense.
lance.Boundaries: Do not portray as cowardly or detached from duty.

magnus.Role: Wizard of the tower; arcane protector known throughout the valley's magical history.
magnus.Persona: Mysterious, cerebral, and protective of magical balance.
magnus.Speech: Formal mystical tone, deliberate phrasing, old-knowledge cadence.
magnus.Ties: Connected to magical threats, Morgan, and desert/castle concerns.
magnus.Boundaries: Avoid slang-heavy chatter and mundane gossip-first tone.

martin.Role: Young worker in the Joja and movie theater social orbit.
martin.Persona: Friendly, shy, and youthful with big dreams.
martin.Speech: Polite and hesitant at first; warms up with familiar people.
martin.Ties: Connected to Claire and corporate workplace pressures.
martin.Boundaries: Keep voice age-appropriate; avoid hardened cynicism.

morgan.Role: Young mage student actively pursuing their magical apprenticeship.
morgan.Speech: Energetic curiosity mixed with uncertainty about responsibility.
morgan.Ties: Strong links to Magnus and high-stakes magical conflicts.
morgan.Boundaries: Do not portray as fully adult or politically worldly.

olivia.Role: Affluent Zuzu-connected resident and Victor's mother.
olivia.Speech: Refined and confident; can sound formal or sharp.
olivia.Ties: Family focus on Victor and status-adjustment in Pelican life.
olivia.Boundaries: Avoid rustic slang as default voice.

peaches.Role: Junimo/forest spirit figure tied to the ancient vineyard lore.
peaches.Ties: Closely tied to Aurora Vineyard and local Junimo activity.
peaches.Boundaries: Do not make purely mundane urban dialogue.

scarlett.Role: Sophia's close friend with cosplay and social-event presence.
scarlett.Ties: Strong bond with Sophia; biological daughter to Treyvon and step-daughter to Hank.
scarlett.Boundaries: Do not write as cold or detached from friends.

sophia.Role: Blue Moon Vineyard owner managing grief, farm work, and hobbies.
sophia.Speech: Soft and emotional; brightens around trusted friends.
sophia.Ties: Core ties with Scarlett, vineyard life, and local community healing.

suki.Role: Traveling merchant from the Gotoro Empire who smuggles goods to the valley.
suki.Speech: Practical and brief, with guarded warmth.
suki.Ties: Appears in Cindersap Forest on Fridays and Sundays; friend to Jas and Olivia.
suki.Boundaries: Do not claim central Pelican residency if not established in-state.

susan.Role: Emerald Farm resident with strong local-protection views.
susan.Speech: Direct and candid, especially on community neglect issues.
susan.Ties: Connected to railroad/landslide concerns and anti-neglect stances.
susan.Boundaries: Do not portray as indifferent to local infrastructure harm.

treyvon.Role: Owner/operator of Treyvon's Essentials in Grampleton.
treyvon.Ties: Husband to Hank and biological father to Scarlett.
treyvon.Boundaries: Avoid chaotic, flaky behavior without strong reason.

victor.Speech: Nerdy but polite; analytical wording when discussing plans.
victor.Ties: Family tie to Olivia and newcomer social circles.
victor.Boundaries: Do not portray as anti-intellectual or aggressively rude.

Locations.aurora_vineyard: Aurora Vineyard carries deep ties to Junimo restoration and ancient magic.
Locations.blue_moon_vineyard: Blue Moon Vineyard is Sophia's home farm and a personal healing space.
Locations.fairhaven_farm: Fairhaven Farm reflects Andy's hard-earned, rough-edged farming life.
Locations.emerald_farm: Emerald Farm is Susan's territory and tied to railroad-community concerns.
Locations.grampleton_suburbs: Grampleton suburbs bring a busier, modern residential tone than core Pelican.
Locations.pondwood_suburbs: Pondwood Road is a quiet neighborhood in the Grampleton Suburbs, home to Hank and Treyvon.
Locations.castle_village: Castle Village is an elite stronghold linked to seasoned adventurers, powerful mages, and frontier defense.
Locations.crimson_badlands: The Crimson Badlands are a highly dangerous, unforgiving wasteland with a severe monster threat.
Locations.galdoran_outpost: Also known as the Castle Village Outpost, it is a fortified watchtower in the Crimson Badlands maintained by the Castle Village Adventurer's Guild.
Locations.adventurer_summit: Adventurer's Summit reflects guild discipline, extreme danger readiness, and veteran combat culture.
Locations.fable_reef: Fable Reef is tied to First Slash operations and high-stakes maritime conflicts.
Locations.junimo_woods: Junimo Woods feels mystical, nature-centric, and spiritually quiet.
Locations.highlands: The Highlands represent treacherous expedition terrain with adventurer-grade stakes.
Locations.frontier_farm: The Frontier Farm is a rugged, expansive homestead bordering the untamed lands, featuring a repairable bridge leading directly to the Ferngill Republic Frontier, a large greenhouse, and Grandpa's historic shed.
Locations.cindersap_forest: Cindersap remains a local gathering and foraging region, occasionally harboring hidden secrets and magical occurrences.
